metadata.description: Batch 18 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 1701-1800; source-aligned sequence

words.definitionEn: a building where important objects are displayed
words.definitionTh: พิพิธภัณฑ์

words.definitionEn: sounds arranged to create an artistic form
words.example: She listens to music at work.

words.definitionEn: relating to music; a play with songs
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับดนตรี / ละครเพลง

words.definitionEn: a person who plays or writes music
used to show necessity or strong belief
belonging to the speaker
used when the speaker is subject and object
difficult to explain or understand
words.example: The machine made a mysterious noise.

words.definitionEn: something difficult to explain or understand
a small metal pin or the hard part at a fingertip
words.definitionTh: ตะปู / เล็บ
words.example: He fixed the board with a nail.

words.definitionEn: a word used to identify someone or something; to identify
words.definitionTh: ชื่อ / ตั้งชื่อ
words.example: Write your name on the form.

words.definitionEn: a story or account of events; relating to storytelling
words.definitionTh: เรื่องเล่า / เชิงบรรยาย
words.example: The report gives a clear narrative.

words.definitionEn: not wide; to become or make less wide
words.definitionTh: แคบ / ทำให้แคบ

words.definitionEn: a country and its people
words.definitionTh: ประเทศ / ชาติ
words.example: The nation adopted a new policy.

words.definitionEn: relating to a whole country; a citizen of a country
words.definitionTh: ระดับชาติ / พลเมือง

words.definitionEn: connected with the place of birth; a person born there
words.definitionTh: พื้นเมือง / คนพื้นเมือง

words.definitionEn: existing in nature and not made by people
in a natural way or as expected
words.definitionTh: โดยธรรมชาติ

words.definitionEn: the physical world and its living things
at a short distance from
words.example: The sensor is near the filler.

words.definitionEn: almost
tidy and arranged carefully
as an unavoidable result or in every case
words.definitionTh: จำเป็นต้อง
words.example: Higher cost does not necessarily mean better quality.

words.definitionEn: needed for a purpose
the body part connecting the head and shoulders
to require something; a requirement
words.definitionTh: ต้องการ / ความจำเป็น

words.definitionEn: a thin pointed tool used for sewing or medical purposes
bad, harmful, below zero, or expressing no
words.definitionTh: เชิงลบ / ลบ

words.definitionEn: a person living near another person
words.definitionTh: เพื่อนบ้าน

words.definitionEn: the area around where people live
not one and not the other of two
words.definitionTh: ไม่ทั้งสอง

words.definitionEn: a fibre carrying messages in the body; courage
words.definitionTh: เส้นประสาท / ความกล้า

words.definitionEn: worried or afraid
words.definitionTh: ประหม่า / กังวล
words.example: She felt nervous before the presentation.

words.definitionEn: material made of connected threads or a system for catching
words.example: A safety net covered the opening.

words.definitionEn: a connected system of people, computers, or things
words.example: The camera uses the factory network.

words.definitionEn: not at any time
despite what was just mentioned
words.definitionTh: อย่างไรก็ตาม
words.example: The test was difficult; nevertheless, it succeeded.

words.definitionEn: recently made, obtained, or introduced
information about recent events
a publication containing news
words.definitionTh: หนังสือพิมพ์
words.example: He reads the newspaper every morning.

words.definitionEn: coming immediately after the present one
words.example: The next meeting is on Friday.

words.definitionEn: beside or immediately adjacent to
words.definitionTh: ถัดจาก / ข้าง ๆ
words.example: The cabinet is next to the machine.

words.definitionEn: pleasant or enjoyable
words.definitionTh: ดี / น่าพอใจ

words.definitionEn: the period of darkness between evening and morning
a frightening dream or very difficult situation
words.example: The delay became a logistical nightmare.

words.definitionEn: the number 9
the number 19
the number 90
used to give a negative answer or show none
words.definitionTh: ไม่ / ไม่มี

words.definitionEn: not any person
no person
an unpleasant or unwanted sound
words.definitionTh: เสียงรบกวน
words.example: The motor makes a loud noise.

words.definitionEn: making a lot of noise
words.definitionTh: มีเสียงดัง

words.definitionEn: not any of a group
used to add another negative statement
words.example: The machine did not stop, nor did it slow down.

words.definitionEn: usual or expected; the usual condition
words.definitionTh: ปกติ / ภาวะปกติ

words.definitionEn: usually or in the expected way
the direction opposite south
words.example: The site is north of Bangkok.

words.definitionEn: located in or from the north
the body part used for smelling and breathing
used to make a word or statement negative
a short written record; to notice or record
words.definitionTh: บันทึก / จด

words.definitionEn: not anything
to become aware of; a written announcement
words.definitionTh: สังเกต / ประกาศ
words.example: Did you notice the warning light?

words.definitionEn: an idea or belief
words.definitionTh: แนวคิด / ความเชื่อ

words.definitionEn: a long fictional story in book form
the eleventh month of the year
at the present time
not in or to any place
words.definitionTh: ไม่มีที่ไหน
words.example: The missing file was nowhere to be found.

words.definitionEn: relating to atomic energy or the nucleus
words.definitionTh: นิวเคลียร์

words.definitionEn: a mathematical value; to assign numbers
words.definitionTh: ตัวเลข / กำหนดหมายเลข

words.definitionEn: many
a person trained to care for sick people
a hard-shelled seed or a small metal fastener
to do what a rule or person says
words.definitionTh: เชื่อฟัง / ปฏิบัติตาม

words.definitionEn: a thing; to express disagreement
words.definitionTh: วัตถุ / คัดค้าน

words.definitionEn: a goal; based on facts rather than feelings
words.definitionTh: วัตถุประสงค์ / เป็นกลาง
words.example: Our objective is to reduce waste.

words.definitionEn: a duty or legal responsibility
words.definitionTh: ภาระผูกพัน / หน้าที่
words.example: The company has a legal obligation.

words.definitionEn: the act of watching carefully or a comment based on it
to watch carefully or notice
words.example: Observe the process for ten minutes.

words.definitionEn: to get something
easy to see or understand
in a way that is easy to understand
words.definitionTh: อย่างชัดเจน

words.definitionEn: a particular time or special event
words.definitionTh: โอกาส / ครั้ง
words.example: On one occasion, the alarm failed.

words.definitionEn: sometimes but not often
words.definitionTh: เป็นครั้งคราว

words.definitionEn: to happen
a very large area of salt water
used after a number to state the time
words.example: The meeting starts at nine o'clock.

words.definitionEn: the tenth month of the year
words.example: The audit is scheduled for October.

words.definitionEn: strange or not divisible by two
words.example: The machine made an odd sound.

words.definitionEn: used to show belonging, amount, or connection
words.example: Check the level of the tank.

words.definitionEn: away from or not operating
words.definitionTh: ปิด / ออกจาก

words.definitionEn: an illegal act or something causing upset
words.definitionTh: ความผิด / การล่วงละเมิด
words.example: The act is a serious offence.

words.definitionEn: to make someone upset or commit an offence
words.definitionTh: ทำให้ขุ่นเคือง

words.definitionEn: causing anger or unpleasantness
words.definitionTh: น่ารังเกียจ / ก้าวร้าว

words.definitionEn: to present something for acceptance; a proposal
words.definitionTh: เสนอ / ข้อเสนอ

words.definitionEn: a room or building where people work
words.example: Her office is on the second floor.

words.definitionEn: a person with authority in an organization
words.definitionTh: เจ้าหน้าที่
words.example: A safety officer inspected the area.

words.definitionEn: approved by an authority; a person in authority
words.definitionTh: เป็นทางการ / เจ้าหน้าที่

words.definitionEn: many times or frequently
